_comment: Frozen cross-language conformance vector for Warden breach-event signing. Every attester runtime (Rust enforcer, Python MCP server, .NET API) MUST reproduce canonical_json byte-for-byte from `event` (minus the signature field) using RFC 8785 (JCS), and MUST reproduce signature_b64url by Ed25519-signing those bytes with the key derived from private_key_seed_hex. Do not edit these values; changing them silently breaks every previously signed event. See docs/breach-event-canonicalization.md.

event.violation: attempted connection to 203.0.113.7:443 not in targets allowlist

canonical_json: {"agent_id":"agent-conformance-001","attester":"warden-enforcer","attester_key_id":"key-conformance-001","breach_id":"00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000001","layer":"network","session_id":"sess-conformance-001","timestamp":"2026-06-30T00:00:00+00:00","token_claim":"targets","violation":"attempted connection to 203.0.113.7:443 not in targets allowlist"}
